question: Which of the following best describes the operations of a rotorcraft?

options.text: Lift is generated by airfoils, has a motor driven propulsion and uses control surfaces for steering.
Lift and propulsion are generated by a single or multiple motor driven propellers and has hovering capabilities.
Take off and land vertically like a rotorcraft and has the ability to transition into horizontal flight like a conventional aeroplane.
Lighter-than-air aircraft where movement is controlled using motor driven propellers.

classification_notes: General UAS knowledge and UA-category topics are being tested.
